name: @parley/miniapp
description: Parley Telegram Mini App — wallet signing + tx submission surface

scripts.sync-assets: rm -rf public/favicon public/social && cp -R ../../artifacts/favicon public/favicon && cp -R ../../artifacts/social public/social && cp ../../artifacts/svg/lockup-horizontal.svg public/lockup-horizontal.svg && cp ../../artifacts/svg/mark.svg public/mark.svg && cp ../../artifacts/svg/mark-on-dark.svg public/mark-on-dark.svg
